title: Die Nibelungen 2. Teil - Kriemhilds Rache
writer: Harald G. Petersson, Harald Reinl, Ladislas Fodor
actors: Rolf Henniger, Siegfried Wischnewski, Maria Marlow
plot: Now Brunhild knows by which treason she was won for king Gunther of Burgund by Siegfried of Xanthen, and has been revenged by his foul murder by Hagen, more bloody revenge is inevitable. Hagen steals the Nibelungen-treasure to sin...
